profile.name: Dr. R.C. Malo
profile.headline: Designing inclusive interfaces & reproducible research
profile.bio: I'm Dr. R.C.Malo — I build usable systems, publish reproducible work, and teach students how to design responsibly. This portfolio showcases my projects, publications, and teaching.

hiring.title: Open to Collaboration & Hiring
hiring.description: I'm actively seeking research collaborators, postdoctoral fellows, and motivated graduate students interested in human-computer interaction, accessibility, and reproducible research methods. If you share a passion for inclusive design and rigorous experimentation, let's build something meaningful together.

lab.title: Advanced Systems & Learning Lab
lab.description: Our lab focuses on building usable systems, publishing reproducible work, and designing responsibly. We explore the intersection of human-computer interaction, machine learning, and accessibility to solve real-world problems. We prioritize hands-on projects, rigorous experiments, and open-source contributions.

projects.title: Assistive UX Toolkit
projects.subtitle: Tooling & patterns for inclusive interfaces
projects.description: A toolkit for designers & developers to build accessible UI components and test assistive workflows.

projects.title: Repro Pipelines
projects.subtitle: Workflows for reproducible experiments
projects.description: Automated scripts and containerized environments that make experiments reproducible.

projects.title: Study Portal
projects.subtitle: Participant recruitment & consent
projects.description: A secure, privacy-preserving portal to manage research participants and consent forms.

publications.authors: Ripon Chandra Malo and Mehedi Ahmed Ansary
publications.description: This study presents a controlled laboratory evaluation of the high vacuum densification method (HVDM) for improving extremely soft soil using a 1 g physical model. Following several trials on the phys...

publications.title: Human-Centered Pipelines for Reproducible Research

experience.title: Assistant Professor

experience.title: Postdoctoral Researcher

education.title: B.S. in Cognitive Science
